meta.title: CNB Mobile — Charge your phone. Earn real tokens.
meta.description: Human Activity DePin on Solana. Every minute charging your phone earns verifiable CNB tokens on-chain. Built at Frontier Colosseum.
meta.keywords: DePin, human activity, Solana, CNB Mobile, blockchain, rewards, charging, on-chain proof, Frontier hackathon

hero.subtitle: Revolutionize the way you charge your device from anywhere in the world. Our innovative global platform turns charging time into valuable points.

features.title: Decentralized physical infrastructure that pays you
features.subtitle: Not airdrop. Not synthetic farming. Real energy turning into real rewards, proof by proof, on-chain.

charging.title: Charging that pays
charging.description: Points per charging minute, with a bonus on every full hour. Every kWh counts.

proof.title: On-chain proof
proof.description: Each session is signed and recorded on Solana. ZK privacy, no black box.

ranking.title: Weekly ranking
ranking.description: The most active users of the week share an extra CNB pool. Real competition.

token.title: CNB Token SPL
token.description: Native SPL token on Solana mainnet. DEX liquidity, transferable, real.

referral.title: Referral system
referral.description: +100 CNB per friend signed up. Grow with your network, earn together.

depin.title: Real DePIN
depin.description: Every reward is backed by a verified charging minute. Useful work.

community.title: Join our community
community.subtitle: More than an app, we are a community. Join thousands of people already earning CNB and sharing crypto experiences.

howItWorks.title: Start earning in less than a minute
howItWorks.subtitle: No heavy KYC, no upfront investment, no special hardware. Just the cable that's already there.

step1.label: Step 01
step1.title: Plug in the charger
step1.description: Plug your phone in like you always do. The app automatically detects when charging starts.

step2.label: Step 02
step2.title: Accumulate verified points
step2.description: Every minute, +10 CNB are accumulated and the session is signed for on-chain proof.

step3.label: Step 03
step3.title: Redeem your CNB
step3.description: Once you reach the minimum balance, redeem CNB tokens to your Solana wallet or trade on DEXs.

hackathon.title: Built at Frontier Colosseum
hackathon.description: CNB Mobile competes in Frontier Colosseum as an energy DePIN solution. On-chain charging proof, SPL token on mainnet, built for the Brazilian and Latin American market.

token.title: CNB Token
token.subtitle: The utility token that powers the CNB network. Distributed by charging proof, transferable, with real liquidity.

founder.name: Rafael Mariano
founder.bio1: Securities Investment Analyst (CNPI), Helicopter Pilot, educator, entrepreneur, and developer of innovative solutions in financial markets and crypto. With experience at XP Investimentos, Rico and Terra Investimentos, he was honored as one of the most influential teachers in his region by SENAI.
founder.bio2: Developer and programmer, Rafael combines technology with transformative skills, making a difference in the lives of thousands of people.
founder.alt: Rafael Mariano, founder and CEO of CNB Mobile

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about CNB Mobile.

waitlist.title: Be the first to know when CNB token launches
waitlist.subtitle: Early access, community drops, and hackathon news straight to your inbox.

footer.downloadSubtitle: Available now on the App Store and Google Play. iOS and Android.

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
body: CNB Mobile is committed to protecting the privacy of our users.

sections.heading: 4. Sharing
body: We do not sell your personal information.

sections.heading: 5. Security
body: Your data is stored with encryption in transit and at rest.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights
body: Access, correction, and deletion of your data. Contact: contato@criptonobolso.com.br

sections.heading: 7. Apple Compliance
body: This App complies with Apple App Store guidelines and App Tracking Transparency (ATT).

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
body: By accessing and using the CNB Mobile application ("App"), you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service.

sections.heading: 2. Description of Service
body: CNB Mobile is a gamified application that rewards users with virtual points for accessing the app daily.
CNB Mobile points DO NOT have real monetary value and do not constitute any form of investment.

sections.heading: 3. Eligibility
body: You must be at least 13 years old to use the App.

sections.heading: 4. User Account
body: To use the App, you must create an account using authentication via Google or Apple.

sections.heading: 5. Usage Rules
items: Do not use the App for illegal purposes
Do not attempt to manipulate the points system
Do not improperly create multiple accounts
Do not use bots or automated tools

sections.heading: 6. Points and Ranking
body: Points are awarded exclusively as a form of gamification. We reserve the right to modify the system at any time.

sections.heading: 7. Intellectual Property
body: All App content is the exclusive property of CNB Mobile.

sections.heading: 8. Limitation of Liability
body: The App is provided "as is". We are not responsible for damages arising from the use of the App.

sections.heading: 9. Modifications
body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
body: contato@criptonobolso.com.br

support.title: Support
support.intro: Need help? Get in touch with our team.
support.emailDescription: For questions, suggestions, or technical issues:

items.a: Just open the app once a day to receive 10 points.
No. Points are exclusively for entertainment and ranking purposes.

items.q: How do I delete my account?
Does the app collect sensitive data?
items.a: No. Only basic profile information via Google or Apple.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Everything you need to know about CNB Mobile.

items.a: A DePIN app that rewards you with CNB tokens for every minute of charging verified on-chain on Solana.
Plug in the charger and open the app. Every charging minute, +10 CNB accumulate, with a +50 bonus on every full hour.

items.q: Do I need a Solana wallet?
items.a: Not for daily app use. To redeem CNB tokens to your own wallet, yes — any Solana wallet works.
Yes. Your charging is monitored locally, and each verified session is signed and submitted to Solana as proof.
We're at hackathon stage. Sign up for the waitlist to be notified.

copyright.title: Copyright & Intellectual Property

sections.heading: 1. Ownership
body: The CNB Mobile application is the exclusive property of Cripto no Bolso, São Paulo, Brazil. Protected by Brazilian Law No. 9,610/98 and Law No. 9,279/96.

sections.heading: 2. Legal Compliance
items: Brazilian Internet Civil Framework — Law No. 12,965/2014
Apple App Store and Google Play guidelines

sections.heading: 3. Restrictions
items: Reproduction, distribution, or modification of any part of the application is prohibited
Reverse engineering or decompilation is prohibited
Use of the brand on third-party products is prohibited

sections.heading: 4. Contact
body: Cripto no Bolso — contato@criptonobolso.com.br

copyright.closing: © 2026 CNB Mobile — Cripto no Bolso. All rights reserved.

deleteAccount.title: Delete my account

sections.heading: 1. Overview
body: You can request deletion of your CNB Mobile account at any time. This page describes how to request it, what gets deleted, and what may be retained as required by law.

sections.heading: 2. Delete from the app
body: The fastest way is to delete directly from the app:
items: Open the CNB Mobile app on your phone.
Your account is disabled immediately and personal data is removed within 30 days.

sections.heading: 3. Delete by email
body: If you no longer have access to the app, send a deletion request from your registered email to contato@criptonobolso.com.br with the subject "Account deletion request — CNB Mobile". We acknowledge the request within 7 business days and complete deletion within 30 days.

sections.heading: 4. Data we delete
items: Preferences, device identifiers and personal usage logs

sections.heading: 5. Data we may retain
body: Some records may be kept after deletion to comply with legal and security obligations:
items: On-chain CNB transactions already executed — public and immutable on the Solana network, outside of our control
Financial and tax records required by Brazilian law
Anonymous security logs for up to 12 months to prevent fraud

sections.heading: 6. Important notices
body: Deletion is permanent and cannot be reversed. Unredeemed points are forfeited. CNB tokens already sent to your Solana wallet remain yours — outside of our control. We recommend redeeming any pending balance before requesting deletion.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
body: Cripto no Bolso — contato@criptonobolso.com.br

deleteAccount.closing: © 2026 CNB Mobile — Cripto no Bolso. All rights reserved.

parceiros.title: Partners
parceiros.intro: Connect your brand to a DePIN network with on-chain proof — sponsored missions, native banners, and token integrations on Solana.

hero.headlineLine1: Your brand, in the daily routine
hero.subtitle: CNB Mobile is Brazil's first Human Activity DePIN. Every minute of usage is on-chain proof. Place your brand inside sponsored missions, native banners, and token integrations — and measure outcomes by completion, not by impression.
hero.partnerStampHint: Exchange partner on the CNB token journey

kpi.title: Active, on-chain audience — and growing
kpi.subtitle: The numbers that matter to sponsors. Updated each release.
kpi.disclaimer: Detailed numbers under NDA — request the deck via the form.

audience.title: Not generic audience. Daily habit, wallet in hand.
audience.subtitle: Each user signed up, opened the app, and triggered on-chain proof. A quality filter no ad network delivers.

mobile.title: Mobile-first
mobile.description: 100% on-phone. Sessions begin with the charger cable. Real attention, not passive scrolling.

sustainable.title: Energy-aware
sustainable.description: CNB users think about their energy use. Green brands, EV, urban mobility, and energy speak directly to them.

web3.title: On-chain savvy
web3.description: Active Solana wallet, comfortable with tokens, open to new protocols. Crypto needs no introduction.

urban.title: Young & urban
urban.description: 18–45, predominantly in capital cities. Mid/upper income, high willingness to try new products.

offerings.title: How your brand shows up
offerings.subtitle: Pick a format or combine several. End-to-end measurement with optional on-chain proof.

missions.title: Sponsored Missions
missions.description: Your brand briefs a mission (e.g., visit a store, try the app, share content). The user completes it, gets CNB + your reward, and you measure by real completion.
missions.example: E.g., "Visit charging station X" → +500 CNB + brand coupon

banners.title: Native In-App Banners
banners.description: Placement inside the feed — no pop-ups, no interruptions. CPM or CPC pricing, with profile-based targeting.
banners.example: E.g., sponsored card between missions, with up to 2 CTAs

cashback.title: Cashback / Pay in CNB
cashback.description: Your brand accepts CNB as payment (auto-converted to BRL via partner gateway) or issues CNB cashback for off-app actions.
cashback.example: E.g., customer pays for coffee, gets 5% back in CNB

geo.title: Geo-fenced Campaigns
geo.description: Missions and banners triggered by location. Ideal for physical retail, gas stations, events, and IRL activations with foot-traffic measurement.
geo.example: E.g., user enters a 200m radius → mission fires

loyalty.title: Loyalty Bridge
loyalty.description: Connect your loyalty program to CNB. User burns brand points, earns CNB. Reverse: spend CNB, earn your points. Cross-loyalty.

irl.title: IRL Brand Activations
irl.description: Co-branding at meetups, hackathons, festivals, and street activations. CNB Mobile + Superteam Brazil + your brand, with integrated digital coverage.
irl.example: E.g., co-branded booth at a Solana hackathon

flow.title: From briefing to reward in 4 steps
flow.subtitle: Human curation, automated execution, on-chain measurement.

brief.label: Step 01
brief.title: Brand briefing
brief.description: You define objective, audience, format (mission/banner/integration), region, and budget. 30-min call.

curate.label: Step 02
curate.title: CNB curation
curate.description: Our team designs the mechanics, validates compliance, and prepares the in-app mission. Shared approval before go-live.

deliver.label: Step 03
deliver.title: Mission live
deliver.description: Users see, complete, and receive CNB on-chain + your brand reward. Real time.

measure.label: Step 04
measure.title: Report + payment
measure.description: Dashboard with completion rate, completer profile, unit cost, and on-chain proof. Pay by invoice or in CNB.

cases.title: Partners already betting on CNB
cases.subtitle: Real community, real partnership, real proof.

bingx.name: BingX
bingx.description: Global exchange partner of CNB Mobile and Official Crypto Exchange Partner of Chelsea FC. Liquidity, infrastructure, and international reach for the CNB token.

okx.name: OKX
okx.description: OKX is CNB Mobile's partner in the crypto ecosystem — a global leading exchange and creator of X Pay, the end-to-end crypto payments platform.

kast.name: KAST
kast.description: KAST partners with CNB Mobile on a Visa Platinum crypto card — taking on-chain balance into everyday payments, aligned with CNB's mission.

tiers.title: Partnership models
tiers.subtitle: Starter packages — every partnership is customizable. Negotiate via the form.

faqSection.title: Frequently asked questions
faqSection.subtitle: Everything you need to know before signing.

items.a: By default, payment in BRL via monthly invoice. On Growth and Enterprise plans we can receive in CNB with auto-conversion. User rewards always go out as CNB on-chain.

items.q: How long until the mission goes live?
items.a: From approved briefing to live mission: 7–14 days. Depends on mechanic complexity and compliance review.
Dashboard with completion rate, sessions, demographic profile of completers, unit cost, and on-chain proof of rewards paid. Consolidated report at the end of each cycle.
On Enterprise, yes — negotiable per category and region. On Pilot and Growth, we operate non-exclusive but guarantee no competitor on the same day.
Every partnership goes through LGPD and Consumer Protection review before go-live. Minimal data collection, explicit user opt-in, region-specific contracts.
Pilot is 30 days. Growth, 90 days. Enterprise, 12 months. Always with the option to upgrade between tiers during the cycle.

items.q: How do I approve the mission before it goes live?
items.a: We share a draft via Notion or Figma; you approve or request changes. It only goes live with written approval from the brand.

items.q: Who runs the partnership on my side?
items.a: Pilot and Growth are managed by the CNB team directly. Enterprise includes a dedicated Account Manager with a 4-business-hour response SLA.

contact.title: Ready to build together?
contact.subtitle: Drop me an email with the idea. I reply myself — no SDR filter, no form queue. Initial response within 24 business hours.
